The wide confidence intervals reflect the inherent high volatility of cryptocurrencies, especially when trading at such an unusual and potentially unsustainable valuation where extreme price swings in either direction are possible based on limited liquidity or speculative interest. Without specific news or catalysts to explain this price, substantial uncertainty remains.
